bird.name: Scopoli's shearwater
bird.summary: Scopoli's shearwater (Calonectris diomedea) is a seabird in the petrel family Procellariidae. It breeds on rocky islands and on steep coast…

locations.name: 巴利阿里群島
locations.summary: 巴利阿里群島（加泰隆尼亞語：Illes Balears，發音：[ˈiʎəz bələˈas]；西班牙語：Islas Baleares，發音：[ˈizlaz βaleˈaɾes]；英語：Balearic Islands，/ˌbæliˈærɪ…

locations.name: 大西洋
locations.summary: 大西洋，即亚特兰蒂斯洋（英語：Atlantic Ocean），是世界第二大洋。原面積8221萬7千平方公里，在南冰洋確立後，面積調整為7676萬2千平方公里。平均深度3,646米，最深處波多黎各海沟深達8,605米。從赤道南北分為北大西洋…

locations.name: 直布羅陀海峽
locations.summary: 直布罗陀海峡是一条连接大西洋与地中海的狭窄海峡，同时将欧洲与非洲分隔开来。 两洲最窄处仅相隔7.7海里（约14.2公里/8.9英里）。每日有渡轮往返两大洲，最快仅需35分钟。海峡深度介于300和900米（980和2,950英尺；160和4…

relations.subject: Scopoli's shearwater
relations.evidence: | date=2009 | title=Breeding shearwaters on Italian islands: population size, island selection and co-existence with their main alien predator, the black rat | journal=Rivista Italiana di Ornitologia | volume=78 | pages=83–99 | url=https://www.researchgate.net/publication/258691157 }} and on the Balearic Islands. At the end of October, after the breeding season, Scopoli's shearwaters migrate to the Atlantic and stream out of the Mediterranean through the Strait of Gibraltar. They return to the Mediterranean at the end of February
